data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Root cause is a bash trap-scoping quirk — guard functions in pre-bash-functions.sh set ERR traps referencing a function-local HOOK_ERROR_LOG that leaks globally on happy-path return. trap - ERR in another function does NOT clear it. When _pre_bash_dispatch returns 2 at pre-bash.sh:139, bash fires the leaked ERR trap producing the two spurious trailer errors ('No such file' + 'return from function'). Fix is 1-location change in pre-bash.sh: add '|| _dispatch_exit=$?' to suppress ERR propagation and expand trap clear to include ERR. No functional change to blocking behavior. ESCALATE: pre-bash.sh is a safeguarded PreToolUse hook (hosts Layer 2 bypass sentinel) per CLAUDE.md rule 22 — user approval required.
